This is a large file. The `test_provider.py` file tests `RealPlanDataProvider` methods (`_build_worktree_mapping`, `_build_row_data`, `close_plan`, `_parse_owner_repo_from_url`, `fetch_plans_by_ids`, `_append_timing_log`).

session.user:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The conversation is summarized below: Analysis: Let me trace through the conversation chronologically:
1. This is a continuation of a previous conversation that was summarized. The original task was implementing plan #8804: "Split PlanDataProvider into PlanService + TUI PlanDataProvider".
2. The previous conversation summary established: - Created PlanService ABC, RealPlanService, FakePlanService in erk_shared - Created slim PlanDataProvider ABC, RealPlanDataProvider, FakePlanDataProvider in erk.tui.data - Updated all production consumers (screens, actions, workers, app.py, CLI commands) - Converted old plan_data_provider/abc.py to re-export - Started converting old plan_data_provider package to re-exports
3. In this continuation session: a. Read the current state of old plan_data_provider files (abc.py, real.py, fake.py, __init__.py) b. Read new files (provider_abc.py, real_provider.py, plan_service/abc.py, fake.py, real.py) c. Converted old `real.py` in erk_shared to a re-export pointing to `erk.tui.data.real_provider` d. Used Task agents to find all test file patterns (24 test files reference plan_data_provider) e. Identified the pattern: all ErkDashApp tests use `ErkDashApp(provider=provider, filters=filters, refresh_interval=0)` and need `service=` added f. Launched 9 parallel Task agents for simple test files (just add import + service= arg): - test_core.py, test_actions.py, test_filter_mode.py, test_command_palette.py, test_one_shot_prompt.py, test_streaming.py, test_operation_tracking.py, test_view_switching.py, test_async_operations.py g. Launched 3 more Task agents for complex test files (need service method calls moved): - test_plan_body_screen.py (set_plan_content, set_objective_content → service) - test_app_filtering.py (set_branch_stack → service) - test_plan_detail_screen.py (just add service=) h. Launched 3 more Task agents for data-layer tests: - test_fetch_plan_content.py → now tests RealPlanService - test_fetch_objective_content.py → now tests RealPlanService - test_real_routing.py → remove clipboard/browser from RealPlanDataProvider constructor i. Directly edited test_provider.py: - Added `from erk_shared.gateway.plan_service.real import RealPlanService` import - Used replace_all to remove `clipboard=FakeClipboard(), browser=FakeBrowserLauncher(),` from all RealPlanDataProvider constructors - Started converting TestClosePlan class to use RealPlanService instead of RealPlanDataProvider, but the edit failed because the replace_all had already modified some of the constructor calls in the search string (the old_string didn't match the current file state) j. Re-read test_provider.py at the TestClosePlan section and found that some constructors in that section still have `clipboard=FakeClipboard(), browser=FakeBrowserLauncher()` because the replace_all pattern only matched the ones that had `http_client=FakeHttpClient()` (the TestClosePlan constructors use a variable `http_client` not `FakeHttpClient()`)
4. Key architectural decisions: - ErkDashApp now takes both `provider: PlanDataProvider` and `service: PlanService` - PlanService is in erk_shared (no TUI deps), PlanDataProvider is in erk.tui.data - Old fake.py in erk_shared kept as combined class for backwards compat - Old real.py converted to re-export - Tests need to create both FakePlanService and FakePlanDataProvider instances
5. The test_provider.py file has several test classes that need different treatments: - TestBuildWorktreeMapping: Uses RealPlanDataProvider - just remove clipboard/browser (DONE by replace_all for ones using FakeHttpClient()) - TestClosePlan: Tests close_plan and _parse_owner_repo_from_url - need to use RealPlanService instead (IN PROGRESS - edit failed) - TestCommentCountsDisplay: Uses RealPlanDataProvider._build_row_data - just remove clipboard/browser (DONE by replace_all) - TestStackedPrDetection: Same pattern (DONE by replace_all) - TestLearnStatusDisplay: Same pattern (DONE by replace_all) - TestBlockingDepsPlans: Has its own _make_provider method (DONE by replace_all for the FakeHttpClient() ones) - TestFetchPlansByIds: Has its own _make_provider method (DONE by replace_all) - TestAppendTimingLog: Has its own _make_provider method (DONE by replace_all)
6. But wait - looking at the TestClosePlan tests, they pass `http_client=http_client` (a variable) not `http_client=FakeHttpClient()`, so the replace_all wouldn't have affected those. Those still have the full `clipboard=FakeClipboard(), browser=FakeBrowserLauncher(), http_client=http_client` pattern. I need to fix these to use RealPlanService instead.
7. Also the TestBlockingDepsPlans._make_provider and TestFetchPlansByIds._make_provider methods - let me check if those were caught by replace_all. Looking at the original code: they have `clipboard=FakeClipboard(), browser=FakeBrowserLauncher(), http_client=FakeHttpClient(),` which WOULD have been caught by the replace_all.
8. The agents (15 total) are all running in background. Several have shown significant progress. I haven't checked their outputs yet.
9. User messages: The only user messages are system prompts continuing the conversation. There's no direct user feedback.
10. Pending tasks from the todo list: - Update tests: imports, split as needed (IN PROGRESS) - Run CI checks and fix issues (PENDING)
11. Immediate next steps: - Finish editing test_provider.py TestClosePlan to use RealPlanService - Check all background agent outputs to verify they completed correctly - Run CI to find remaining issues - Complete the plan-implement workflow (signal end, upload, submit PR)
Summary: 1. Primary Request and Intent: The user triggered `/erk:plan-implement 8804` to implement plan #8804: **"Split PlanDataProvider into PlanService + TUI PlanDataProvider"**. The goal is to refactor a monolithic `PlanDataProvider` class that mixed domain operations (close_plan, dispatch, fetch content) with TUI display assembly (fetch_plans, fetch_branch_activity) into two clean abstractions: - `PlanService` (in `erk_shared`) - domain operations with no TUI type dependencies - `PlanDataProvider` (in `erk.tui.data`) - TUI data assembly with only 4 methods
This is a continuation from a prior session where phases 1-8 were completed (new ABCs created, implementations created, consumers updated, old abc.py converted to re-export). The current session picks up at converting remaining old package files to re-exports and updating 24 test files.
2. Key Technical Concepts: - ABC (Abstract Base Class) pattern for gateway interfaces - Separation of domain operations from TUI display assembly - Mixin pattern used by TUI app (NavigationActionsMixin, FilterActionsMixin, etc.) - Two-object injection: `ErkDashApp.__init__` now requires both `provider: PlanDataProvider` and `service: PlanService` - Re-export pattern for backwards-compatible module migration - Fake-driven testing with `FakePlanDataProvider` (TUI data) and `FakePlanService` (domain ops) - Textual TUI framework with `@work(thread=True)` background workers - Python 3.10 target
3. Files and Code Sections:
**OLD PACKAGE RE-EXPORTS (converted this session):**
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/plan_data_provider/real.py` - Converted from full monolithic implementation to re-export - ```python """Re-export RealPlanDataProvider from its new home for backwards compatibility.""" from erk.tui.data.real_provider import RealPlanDataProvider __all__ = ["RealPlanDataProvider"] ```
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/plan_data_provider/fake.py` - Kept as full combined class (has both provider and service methods) for backwards compat - Updated ABC import to `from erk.tui.data.provider_abc import PlanDataProvider` - Still has domain methods (close_plan, set_plan_content, etc.) as extra non-ABC methods
**NEW FILES (created in prior session, verified this session):**
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/plan_service/abc.py` - PlanService ABC - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/plan_service/real.py` - RealPlanService - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/plan_service/fake.py` - FakePlanService with `set_*` methods - `src/erk/tui/data/provider_abc.py` - Slim PlanDataProvider ABC (4 abstract methods) - `src/erk/tui/data/real_provider.py` - RealPlanDataProvider (TUI data assembly only) - Constructor: `__init__(self, ctx, *, location, http_client)` - NO clipboard/browser - `src/erk/tui/data/fake_provider.py` - FakePlanDataProvider + `make_plan_row()` helper
- `src/erk/tui/app.py` - ErkDashApp now takes both `provider` and `service`: ```python def __init__(self, *, provider: PlanDataProvider, service: PlanService, filters: PlanFilters, refresh_interval: float = 15.0, initial_sort: SortState | None = None, cmux_integration: bool = False) ```
**TEST FILES BEING UPDATED (via background Task agents - 15 agents launched):**
Simple updates (add FakePlanService import + service= to ErkDashApp constructors): - `tests/tui/app/test_core.py` (agent a2814d9) - `tests/tui/app/test_actions.py` (agent a96cd8a) - `tests/tui/app/test_filter_mode.py` (agent a3b7d39) - `tests/tui/app/test_command_palette.py` (agent a67c0c6) - `tests/tui/app/test_one_shot_prompt.py` (agent ac71333) - `tests/tui/app/test_streaming.py` (agent a0bb67f) - `tests/tui/app/test_operation_tracking.py` (agent a90023b) - `tests/tui/app/test_view_switching.py` (agent a5521dc) - `tests/tui/app/test_async_operations.py` (agent a1f90ec) - `tests/tui/app/test_plan_detail_screen.py` (agent a8de90c)
Complex updates (add service + move set_* calls from provider to service): - `tests/tui/app/test_plan_body_screen.py` (agent ad9f266) - `provider.set_plan_content` → `service.set_plan_content` - `tests/tui/app/test_app_filtering.py` (agent aa61a70) - `provider.set_branch_stack` → `service.set_branch_stack`
Data-layer test rewrites: - `tests/tui/data/test_fetch_plan_content.py` (agent aacca42) - test RealPlanService instead of RealPlanDataProvider - `tests/tui/data/test_fetch_objective_content.py` (agent a18b873) - test RealPlanService instead - `tests/erk_shared/gateway/plan_data_provider/test_real_routing.py` (agent a217c98) - remove clipboard/browser from constructor
**DIRECTLY EDITED (this session):**
- `tests/tui/data/test_provider.py` - Large file (~2050 lines) with multiple test classes: - Added `from erk_shared.gateway.plan_service.real import RealPlanService` import - Used `replace_all` to remove `clipboard=FakeClipboard(), browser=FakeBrowserLauncher(),` from all `RealPlanDataProvider(...)` constructors that had `http_client=FakeHttpClient()` - TestClosePlan class still needs conversion to use RealPlanService (edit attempt failed - see errors)
**FILES NOT NEEDING CHANGES:** - `tests/tui/screens/test_objective_plans_fake_provider.py` - Only uses FakePlanDataProvider directly (no ErkDashApp) - `tests/tui/filtering/test_logic.py` - Only uses make_plan_row - `tests/tui/test_plan_table.py` - Only uses make_plan_row - `tests/tui/commands/test_execute_command.py` - Only uses make_plan_row - `tests/tui/commands/test_registry.py` - Only uses make_plan_row - `tests/tui/screens/test_launch_screen.py` - Only uses make_plan_row - `tests/unit/plan_store/test_lifecycle_display.py` - Tests lifecycle display logic - `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_dash_data.py` - Only uses make_plan_row
4. Errors and fixes: - **"File has not been read yet" error** when trying to write to old `real.py`: Fixed by re-reading the file with a `limit=5` parameter before writing. - **replace_all edit for TestClosePlan failed**: The search string included `http_client=http_client,` (already had `clipboard`/`browser` removed by the earlier replace_all), but the TestClosePlan constructors use `http_client=http_client` (a variable, not `FakeHttpClient()`), so the replace_all pattern `clipboard=FakeClipboard(), browser=FakeBrowserLauncher(), http_client=FakeHttpClient(),` didn't match them. The TestClosePlan section still has `clipboard=FakeClipboard(), browser=FakeBrowserLauncher(),` in its constructor calls. The subsequent large edit attempt to rewrite the entire TestClosePlan class failed because the old_string contained `http_client=http_client,` (matching the incorrectly assumed post-replace_all state) but the actual file still had the full `clipboard=FakeClipboard(), browser=FakeBrowserLauncher(), http_client=http_client,` pattern.
5. Problem Solving: - Determined that old `fake.py` in erk_shared should be kept as-is (combined class) rather than converted to re-export, because the new `FakePlanDataProvider` is slim (no domain methods) while tests rely on the combined class having both sets of methods. - Identified that `ErkDashApp` tests need a `FakePlanService()` instance for the new `service=` parameter, while `set_plan_content`/`set_branch_stack`/`set_objective_content` calls must move from provider to service. - The `test_provider.py` TestClosePlan class tests `close_plan()` and `_parse_owner_repo_from_url()` which now live on `RealPlanService`, requiring those tests to construct `RealPlanService` instead of `RealPlanDataProvider`.
6. All user messages: - "This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context... Please continue the conversation from where we left it off without asking the user any further questions. Continue with the last task that you were asked to work on." - No other direct user messages - the rest are system reminders about agent progress and todo list.
7. Pending Tasks: - **Finish editing `tests/tui/data/test_provider.py`**: The TestClosePlan class still needs to be converted to use `RealPlanService` instead of `RealPlanDataProvider`. The TestClosePlan constructors still have `clipboard=FakeClipboard(), browser=FakeBrowserLauncher()` and call `provider.close_plan()` / `provider._parse_owner_repo_from_url()`. - **Check all 15 background Task agent outputs** to verify they completed correctly. - **Run CI checks** (`make ci` or equivalent) to find any remaining import or type errors. - **Complete plan-implement workflow**: signal GitHub ended, upload session, clean up impl context, submit PR.
8. Current Work: I was in the middle of editing `tests/tui/data/test_provider.py` to convert the `TestClosePlan` class from testing `RealPlanDataProvider` domain methods to testing `RealPlanService` domain methods. The replace_all successfully removed `clipboard=`/`browser=` from most `RealPlanDataProvider` constructors in the file, but the `TestClosePlan` section still has them because those constructors use `http_client=http_client` (variable) instead of `http_client=FakeHttpClient()` (literal), so the replace_all pattern didn't match.
I re-read the file at line 495-584 and confirmed the TestClosePlan section at lines 526-532 still has: ```python provider = RealPlanDataProvider( ctx=ctx, location=location, clipboard=FakeClipboard(), browser=FakeBrowserLauncher(), http_client=http_client, )
closed_prs = provider.close_plan(123, "https://github.com/test/repo/issues/123") ```
This needs to become: ```python service = RealPlanService( ctx, location=location, clipboard=FakeClipboard(), browser=FakeBrowserLauncher(), http_client=http_client, )
closed_prs = service.close_plan(123, "https://github.com/test/repo/issues/123") ```
The same pattern applies to all 3 test methods in TestClosePlan (test_close_plan_uses_http_client, test_close_plan_closes_linked_prs, test_parse_owner_repo_from_url).
9. Optional Next Step: Continue editing `tests/tui/data/test_provider.py` to convert the TestClosePlan class to use `RealPlanService`. Then check all 15 background Task agent outputs and run CI to find remaining issues. The last edit attempt failed because the old_string didn't match the current file state - need to re-read the exact current content around the TestClosePlan class and construct the correct edit.. Please continue the conversation from where we left it off without asking the user any further questions. Continue with the last task that you were asked to work on.
session.assistant: I need to continue editing `tests/tui/data/test_provider.py` to convert the TestClosePlan class to use `RealPlanService`, then check all background agent outputs and run CI. Let me start by reading the current state of the TestClosePlan section.
